title: Property Consultant - K Raheja Corp - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - K Raheja Corp - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
K Raheja Corp has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Allahabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About K Raheja Corp:
K Raheja Corp is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with K Raheja Corp!
